description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% jersey knit cotton, has a ribbed round neck, ribbed cuffs, ribbed hemline, and grey and green stripes all overFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style with this flat knit cotton T-shirt from spykar. The ribbed sleeve hems and pullover hem sit snug, while the knit round neck adds to it a fashionable twist. Team this pullover with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in pulloversHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
